data.name: Horny Doctor
data.detailed_description:
Horny Doctor is our second entry in the Horny Series, a simulation game where you pose as a doctor with no medical skills.

After being fired from your previous job, you somehow land a position at a small clinic despite having zero medical experience. Desperation fuels your decisions as you fumble through procedures, hoping no one notices your lack of skill.

Every patient is a gamble, and you’re betting on your reputation. With each reckless guess, you drift further from protocol and closer to disaster. Your confidence swells with every lucky bluff, but one wrong move could expose you and put you on the operating table instead.

Will you bluff your way to success, or will you get you booted once again?

HOW TO PLAY?

As a doctor, your job is simple: examine patients, diagnose diseases, and treat them.

On the left side of the screen, you’ll find a range of medical instruments. Carefully inspect the patient to spot the highlighted area that needs attention. Choose the right tool, then drag it to the affected spot to perform the procedure.

Use precision and timing to ensure the procedure is successful.

GAME FEATURES

  • 10+ unique and beautiful patients, each with varying medical conditions.

  • 8+ varied medical instruments—whether you know how to use them or not.

  • 30+ fully animated lewd scenes

  • Character Selection Screen

  • Gallery Mode for Unlocked scenes

  • Auto-Mode and Manual-mode for sex scenes

  • Lewd Scene Speed Option

  • Unique Simulation for each patient

data.short_description: Become a Horny Doctor of a highly reputable medical clinic and diagnose different unique patients. As you get to know them professionally, intimately, romantically, and sexually, will you be able to do your job well enough and resist the temptation?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
